Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a DECLARE model for a loan application review process The goal is to add constraints that mitigate bias based on sensitive attributes eg ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace The example model does not explicitly include activities related to sensitive attributes or bias checks

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are allowed to introduce new activities like ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck and new constraints that enforce fairness

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We assume that the process can have additional activities that are not in the original model We are to add constraints that ensure fairness

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let us define the following new activities that we assume are part of the process ManualReview a manual review step that is intended to mitigate bias BiasMitigationCheck a step that checks for bias before a decision CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge activities that check sensitive attributes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will add constraints that enforce the following

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We might want to require that ManualReview exists in every trace where a decision is made or at least for traces that involve sensitive attributes However the original model already has FinalDecision and StartApplication We can add a coexistence between FinalDecision and ManualReview to ensure that if a final decision is made then a manual review must have occurred

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can add a nonsuccession constraint that prevents CheckApplicantRace from being directly followed by FinalDecision or any decision activity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can require that after a sensitive attribute check a BiasMitigationCheck must occur as a response For example if CheckApplicantRace occurs then BiasMitigationCheck must occur later in the trace

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can require that before a FinalDecision a ManualReview must have occurred precedence

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Given the instructions we are to add constraints that limit the process bias

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will add the following Coexistence between FinalDecision and ManualReview Nonsuccession or nonchainsuccession preventing CheckApplicantRace from being immediately followed by FinalDecision Response ensuring that after CheckApplicantRace a BiasMitigationCheck must occur Precedence ensuring that ManualReview must occur before FinalDecision

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We must be cautious because the original model does not have ManualReview We are introducing it We assume that ManualReview is an activity that is part of the process and can be performed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In coexistence add between FinalDecision and ManualReview In precedence add that ManualReview must precede FinalDecision In response add that after CheckApplicantRace a BiasMitigationCheck must occur In nonchainsuccession add that CheckApplicantRace cannot be immediately followed by FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We also note that the original model does not have CheckApplicantRace and BiasMitigationCheck in any constraints We are adding them

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Rationale Coexistence between FinalDecision and ManualReview ensures that every final decision is accompanied by a manual review Precedence ensures that the manual review is conducted before the final decision Response ensures that after checking an applicants race a bias mitigation check is performed Nonchainsuccession prevents immediate decision making after checking a sensitive attribute
